query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role, sr.code as role_code, sr.name as role_name 
FROM users u 
LEFT JOIN userSystemRoles ur ON u.id = ur.userId AND ur.isActive = 1
LEFT JOIN systemRoles sr ON ur.roleId = sr.id 
ORDER BY u.id 
LIMIT 10;
